Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Ilies Mardhi v. Daniel Viveros.

Video.summary: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.
Video.title: M1Challenge87_MikutsaVSSilva.mp4

Video.summary: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS

Video.summary: Trenton Rowell trains out of two different gyms in his small town, perfecting his ground game at one and working his striking at the other. He loves MMA, and is always looking for new ways to grow his skills regardless of his results. Trenton epitomizes Process over Outcome in his training, as he never focuses on the title, but rather simply trying to be in the best shape possible while balancing work, MMA and family life.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Trenton Rowell
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Trenton Rowell

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Trenton Rowell
Out of the Cage - Trenton Rowell
Out of the Cage - Trenton Rowell

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Anton Tokarchuk
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Anton Tokarchuk
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Anton Tokarchuk

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Anton Tokarchuk
Fighter Profile: Anton Tokarchuk
Fighter Profile: Anton Tokarchuk

Video.summary: Sam Franchi moved from Venezuela to Canada when he was 14 years old. His initial introduction to martial arts came first through Jiu Jitsu. He eventually made a complete transition to MMA. He is the Hard Knocks Flyweight Champion in the amateur division and hopes to keep a clean record while working his way professional division.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi
Video.title: Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi

Image.alt: Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi
Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi
Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi

Video.summary: Patrick Ward always pushes himself to be the best. He is no stranger to hard work, both in the gym and working his day job on the construction site in all kinds of inclimate weather.
